ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The terminal app to launch. Mac: Terminal, iTerm, Warp, Ghostty, Alacritty, WezTerm / Windows: powershell.exe, pwsh, wt
ast.target: 要启动的终端应用程序。Mac：Terminal、iTerm、Warp、Ghostty、Alacritty、WezTerm / Windows：powershell.exe、pwsh、wt

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add 'open terminal here' to the editor context menu.
ast.target: 在编辑器上下文菜单中添加“在此处打开终端”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add 'open terminal here' to the file explorer context menu. Works for both files and folders.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器上下文菜单中添加“在此处打开终端”。适用于文件和文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command 'open terminal here' is always registered. Assign a hotkey via Obsidian's hotkeys settings.
ast.target: “在此处打开终端”命令始终已注册。通过 Obsidian 的快捷键设置分配快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a terminal button in the ribbon. Requires reloading the plugin after changing this setting.
ast.target: 在功能区中显示终端按钮。更改此设置后需要重新加载插件。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件资源管理器右键菜单

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This plugin only works with local vaults.
ast.target: 此插件仅适用于本地库。
